name: cityops-ai
description: CityOps AI — AI-powered city operations management platform

scripts.build: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.format: cd backend && npm run format && cd ../frontend && npm run format
scripts.clean: cd backend && npm run clean && cd ../shared && npm run clean
